name: Lennar Mortgage, LLC Charlotte
description_short: Lennar Mortgage Charlotte finances new construction home purchases through the Lennar Family of Builders network, with a team of 12+ loan officers serving NC, SC, and GA.
description_long:
Lennar Mortgage is the lending arm of Lennar, one of the nation's largest home builders, and has been in operation for over 50 years. The Charlotte branch (NMLS #1726680) is located at 11605 N Community House Rd and specializes exclusively in financing new construction homes purchased through Lennar Family of Builders properties. The company positions itself as a vertically integrated mortgage provider designed to streamline the financing process for new home buyers within their builder network.

The Charlotte branch offers digital mortgage applications, pre-qualification services, and loan origination through a dedicated team of loan officers. Each officer is individually NMLS-licensed and many hold additional state licenses (GA, KS). The branch is supported by satellite staff in Greenville, SC. Their primary service model focuses on guiding buyers through the mortgage process for newly constructed homes, emphasizing the advantage of having a financing partner familiar with Lennar's construction timelines and specifications.

Lennar Mortgage distinguishes itself through deep integration with Lennar's homebuilding operations—loan officers understand construction loan mechanics and timing unique to new builds. The company provides first-time homebuyer education materials and maintains a substantial local team (10 loan officers plus production management in Charlotte alone), suggesting robust capacity. Their multi-state licensing (NC, SC, GA) indicates regional operational scope.

However, this company's primary limitation is its narrow focus: they finance almost exclusively new construction homes from Lennar builders, not existing homes or non-Lennar properties. Borrowers seeking to purchase resale homes, refinance existing mortgages, or finance homes from other builders will need to look elsewhere. The website lacks details on specific loan products, rates, down payment requirements, or whether they offer government-backed loans (FHA, VA, USDA). There is no pricing transparency.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specializes in new construction financing with deep integration into Lennar's building timelines and processes
12+ individually NMLS-licensed loan officers with multi-state credentials (NC, SC, GA) providing local expertise
Offers free first-time homebuyer guide and educational resources for mortgage basics
Digital mortgage application available for convenience and faster processing
Regional operational capacity with Charlotte headquarters plus Greenville, SC support office
Over 50 years of company history and operational experience in mortgage lending
Pre-qualification process available to assess borrowing capacity before formal application
cons: Limited to Lennar Family of Builders properties only—cannot finance resale homes or non-Lennar new construction
Website provides no information on specific loan products, interest rates, APRs, or down payment requirements
No mention of government-backed loan options (FHA, VA, USDA) or loan type variety
No customer reviews, ratings, or third-party performance data visible on website
Pricing and cost structure completely opaque—no fee schedule or comparison tools provided
best_for: First-time homebuyers purchasing new Lennar-built homes in North Carolina, South Carolina, or Georgia
Repeat Lennar homebuyers familiar with the builder's quality and financing process
Borrowers seeking streamlined financing coordinated directly with new construction timelines
diagnosis: Lennar Mortgage Charlotte is best for new home buyers actively purchasing from Lennar's builder network in the Southeast who want streamlined financing integrated with construction schedules. The critical caveat is exclusivity: this lender will not finance existing homes, competing builders, or non-Lennar properties, making them unsuitable for most resale or non-Lennar transactions.
services: Mortgage origination for new Lennar construction purchases
Multi-state mortgage licensing and compliance (NC, SC, GA)
Construction timing coordination for new home builds
Mortgage options counseling aligned with buyer goals
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 11605 N Community House Rd Suite 400A, Charlotte, NC 28277
